tasks.subject: Fix Go compilation errors in ctxharvester, repograph, projects, and harnesses packages
tasks.description:
Resolve compilation errors preventing Go build success:
1. ctxharvester/pruner.go: scoredChunk redeclared, undefined: strings
2. repograph/graph.go: fmt imported and not used, NodeType redeclared
3. projects/tracker.go: undefined: fmt
4. harnesses/skill_store.go: Skill redeclared
5. harnesses/assimilator.go: declared and not used: info

tasks.subject: Pull latest and merge all feature branches
tasks.description: git fetch --all, git pull, merge any feature branches into main

tasks.subject: Rename all Borg references back to borg
tasks.description: Find all references to Borg, borg, @borg, robertpelloni, etc. and rename to borg equivalents. This includes package names, imports, URLs, display strings, config, docs, folder names, etc.
tasks.activeForm: Renaming Borg to borg across codebase

tasks.subject: Rebuild, verify, and push
tasks.description: After rename, rebuild core + CLI, verify server starts, push to both remotes

tasks.subject: Create LLMClient interface with waterfall routing (NIM → OpenRouter → LM Studio)
tasks.description:
Build internal/llm/ package with:
- LLMClient interface with Chat/ChatStream methods
- TierConfig struct for each provider (NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, LM Studio)
- WaterfallRouter that cascades on 429/5xx
- Request/Response types
- Unit tests

tasks.subject: Create MCP progressive tool routing with vector semantic search
tasks.description:
Build internal/mcp/vector/ package with:
- SQLite + sqlite-vec schema for MCP tool catalog with embeddings
- ToolSchema struct with vector column
- Cosine similarity search returning top-K tools
- Router that feeds filtered schemas to LLM for deterministic selection
- Integration with existing mcp/decision.go

tasks.subject: Create dual-tier memory architecture (L1 Scratchpad + L2 Vault)
tasks.description:
Build internal/vault/ package with:
- L1 SessionScratchpad (in-memory SQLite, ephemeral)
- L2 Vault (on-disk SQLite with vector extension)
- Dual-format commits: "raw" transcripts + "heuristic" summaries
- Bridge: L2→L1 semantic context injection on session init
- Full schema DDL, migration, CRUD operations
- Unit tests

tasks.subject: Verify Go build compiles and all tests pass
tasks.description: Run go build ./... and go test ./internal/llm/... ./internal/mcp/vector/... ./internal/vault/... and fix any compilation errors
